common.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: On-demand, vetted caregivers for families across the US. A product of All Care 4 U Group Limited.
footer.emergency: For care emergencies dial 911. Use the in-app SOS button for active-shift incidents.

auth.chooserSubtitle: Pick the account type you’re signing in with. Each takes you to the right place.
auth.fallbackSubtitle: Use your email or your Google account. New here? We’ll set you up automatically.
auth.sentLink: We’ve sent you a one-click sign-in link. It expires in 1 hour.
auth.errorCallback: We couldn’t sign you in. The link may have expired — please try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.audienceCaregiverDesc: Pick up shifts, manage bookings, and get paid.
auth.audienceFamilyDesc: Book trusted carers and manage your care plan.
auth.audienceOrgDesc: Care homes, agencies, health systems, schools, and nonprofits.
auth.caregiverHeadline: Sign in to your caregiver account
auth.caregiverIntro: Pick up shifts, manage bookings, see your payouts, and grow your reputation.
auth.familyHeadline: Sign in to your family account
auth.familyIntro: Use your email or your Google account. New here? We’ll set you up automatically when you sign in — no separate signup needed.
auth.orgHeadline: Sign in to your organization account
auth.orgIntro: Care homes, agencies, health systems, fostering agencies, schools, and nonprofits — manage bookings, contracts, and your team.
auth.scannerNote: We’ll email you a numeric code instead of a clickable link, so email scanners can’t hijack your sign-in.
auth.codeSentTo: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it below. The code expires in 1 hour.
auth.invalidOrExpired: That code is invalid or expired. Try again or request a new one.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password to finish resetting your account.
auth.resetExpiredPrefix: Your reset link has expired or is invalid. Please

search.title: Vetted caregivers near you.
search.subtitle: Every caregiver here is identity-verified, background-checked, and ready to take bookings.
search.showingForDate: Showing carers for {date}. Confirm exact times when you message them.
search.genderHint: Check any that work — leave blank for all.
search.requiredCertsHint: Carer must hold every one checked.
search.ratesNote: Rates are pre–service-fee. Final price shown at checkout.
search.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# caregiver matches your filters} other {# caregivers match your filters}}
search.noResultsTitle: No caregivers match these filters yet.
search.noResultsBody: Try widening your search — fewer filters, a nearby city, or a broader rate range. New caregivers are joining weekly.
search.vettingBody: ID + selfie, full background check, payouts-enabled.

booking.entryTitle: What kind of care do you need?
booking.entrySubtitle: Two simple paths. Pick the one that fits your situation — we’ll take it from there.
booking.endAfterStart: End time must be after start
booking.enterPostcodePricing: Enter your ZIP code to see live pricing
booking.heldSecurely: Held securely. Released to carer 24h after shift.
booking.enterPostcodeAvailability: Enter a ZIP code to see availability
booking.carersInArea: {count, plural, one {✦ # carer in your area} other {✦ # carers in your area}}
booking.carersAvailable: {count, plural, one {✦ # carer available} other {✦ # carers available}}
booking.recurringBody: Book the same carer for a weekly schedule — same time, same person, zero re-booking. We’re finishing it now. Join the waitlist and we’ll email you the moment it goes live.
booking.recurringSuccess: You’re on the list. We’ll be in touch shortly.
booking.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

accessibility.largeTextHelp: Increases base font size to 18px across the app
accessibility.voiceBookingHelp: Use your microphone to search or post a care job hands-free

voice.prompt: What would you like to do?
voice.didntCatch: Didn't catch that. Please try again.
voice.exampleHint: Try: "Book Sarah for tomorrow 3pm" or "Find a caregiver in Boston"
voice.micPermission: Microphone access is needed for voice booking.
voice.notSupported: Voice not supported on this device

upcoming.title: Upcoming — not yet earned
upcoming.caption: {count, plural, =0 {No confirmed bookings yet} one {# confirmed booking} other {# confirmed bookings}}

empty.title: No earnings yet
empty.body: Completed bookings will show up here with your take-home pay.

earnings.loadError: Couldn't load your earnings. Please try again.
